title: liftingLog
description: During the adventure, you can get a hardened log by breaking the log that is lined up in 3 blocks vertically. While carrying this log ... When attacking, it performs various motions depending on the position of the enemy. When you run, you get faster.
body: During the adventure, you can get a hardened log by breaking the log that is lined up in 3 blocks vertically. While carrying this log ... When attacking, it performs various motions depending on the position of the enemy. When you run, you get faster. If you right-click while looking up diagonally, you can travel a long distance by throwing.
